name: GitHub
description: Code hosting, review and CI/CD platform; audit log and security evidence.

steps.action: Navigate to your GitHub Organization > Settings > Audit log
steps.security_note: Audit log access requires Owner role; consider creating a dedicated audit account

steps.action: Use the search bar to filter events (e.g., action:repo.create for new repos, action:org.update_member for membership changes)
steps.audit_note: GitHub audit log retains events for 180 days (Enterprise Cloud) or 90 days (free)

steps.action: Click Export > JSON or CSV to download the filtered audit log entries
For branch protection evidence, navigate to repo > Settings > Branches and screenshot the protection rules
steps.audit_note: Branch protection changes appear in the audit log with before/after values

steps.action: Upload the exports and screenshots to the evidence repository with the evidence ID reference
steps.security_note: Ensure no personal access tokens or webhook secrets are visible in screenshots

L2.title: GitHub Audit Log Streaming & API Automation

steps.action: Navigate to Organization Settings > Audit log > Audit log streaming and configure a stream destination (S3, Azure Blob, Datadog, or Splunk)
steps.security_note: Audit log streaming requires Enterprise Cloud plan

steps.action: Use the GitHub REST API to programmatically query branch protection rules: GET /repos/{owner}/{repo}/branches/{branch}/protection
Create a scheduled GitHub Action workflow that exports audit log data using the Audit Log API and stores it as a workflow artifact
steps.audit_note: GitHub Actions workflows are themselves audited in the audit log

steps.action: Configure Dependabot alerts and security advisories to auto-create issues for vulnerability tracking
Enable GitHub Audit Log Streaming to your SIEM or S3 bucket via enterprise settings
steps.security_note: Use dedicated service credentials for the streaming endpoint

steps.action: Create GitHub Actions workflow that calls the Audit Log API daily to export organisation-level events
steps.permissions_required: Organization admin PAT with admin:org scope

steps.action: Automate branch protection compliance checks — script that verifies all repos meet required protection rules via API
Configure Dependabot and code scanning alerts as automated security evidence
steps.audit_note: Automated scanning results serve as evidence of secure development practices

steps.action: Set up alerting for audit log streaming failures and policy violations
Deploy GitHub Advanced Security metrics tracking — code scanning alerts, secret scanning, dependency review across all repos
Create evidence dashboard: MTTR for security alerts, code review coverage %, branch protection compliance rate
Implement automated compliance gating in CI/CD — PRs cannot merge without passing security checks, serving as continuous evidence
Build monthly DevSecOps evidence package: scanning trends, remediation velocity, policy compliance rates
steps.audit_note: Trend data demonstrates sustained security practice maturity

steps.action: Configure automated quarterly review of GitHub organisation settings, SSO enforcement, and IP allow lists
